title: Full Type-Safe API with tRPC + Prisma + Zod
description: End-to-end type-safe API layer for Next.js using tRPC for the API layer, Prisma as the ORM, and Zod for input validation — no code generation, no REST, no schema drift.

steps.description: Initialize the Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Prisma ORM with your database (PostgreSQL, SQLite, etc.) and generate the client
Install Zod for runtime input validation and type inference on procedure inputs
Install and configure tRPC with Next.js App Router, creating the router, context, and React Query integration
Set up Vitest to unit-test tRPC procedures using the createCallerFactory helper
Deploy to Vercel with the production database connection string configured as an environment variable
